---
name: New skill
about: Request or propose a new best-practice skill for grimoire
labels: new-skill
---

## Skill name (proposed)

<!-- verb-first, kebab-case: propose-X, review-X, design-X, etc. -->

## Domain / sub-domain

<!-- e.g. engineering/development, health/fitness, finance/investing -->

## What best practice does this encode?

<!-- One sentence: what does the practitioner DO, and why is it the right approach? -->

## Evidence of majority top-tier adoption

<!-- Name the specific organizations, institutions, or standard bodies that use this.
     "Many companies" or "industry standard" is not enough — name them. -->

## Measurable impact

<!-- A %, time saved, defect reduction, risk reduction, or named study.
     "Significantly improves quality" is not enough — cite the number or study. -->

## Sources

<!-- External: engineering blog, standard body, clinical guideline, named study. -->
